name: io.github.jessedu29260-netizen/booboo
title: Booboo
description: Query your AI system's wiring, knowledge, memory, agents and crons as one rooted graph over MCP.

packageArguments.name: --snapshot
packageArguments.description: Path to your Booboo graph snapshot, produced by `booboo build` (scaffold one with `npx create-booboo`).

packageArguments.name: --org
packageArguments.description: Optional organigram file — adds the booboo_boot / booboo_org tools so agents boot from the org.
